reviews.review_description: Add a technic section full of wheels etc to build cars
Lease add motors and moving parts to the game. Its a great game but i wish there were wheels and others to make cars and other machines
It hasn't gotten an update in 2 years when there could still be so much to add

While the game has its issues, it’s absolutely amazing. I haven’t even had it that long and I already love it. For any Lego fan it’s is an amazing experience, as it has the majority of the basic Lego pieces, and the ones you do have can make up other pieces that they don’t have right now. It’s heat just getting to build whatever you want infinitely as well. However, the game does have a few things that need fixed. For example, sometimes the tracking just doesn’t work great, but it’s still enough for the game to work well, but occasionally clicking certain things doesn’t work, and your controllers might disable completely. It also does still have a limited selection of Lego. I get that it’s incredibly difficult to design and make function, but it would be great to have just a couple more to complete the basic collection. Overall though, the great experience makes up for all of that, and I love the game so much. Would 100% recommend to any Lego fan.

Fix the handtracking (give it a better more smarter system to tell when your actually grabbing something and at what angle and exactly when to let go) since that is an extreme issue that ruins that side of the game but besides that the rest of it is really good and I’d highly recommend. One thing I also recommend developers fix is the UI for selecting bricks and also the build plate as it isn’t good like at all and feels too bland and not smooth. I don’t mean any harm of course to the hardworking developers making thie game, this is just a heartfelt honest review from a  customer who believes it could be better. Stay safe!💙⚙️

developer_response.body: Thanks for the thoughtful feedback, for the last 6 months I have been working on a new version, I switched to simplified pinch gesture and use only the handtracking for the hand collisions and remade all the ui once again. I want to release it for the apple headset first and then come back to this and port it back. Stay tuned. I might also just release it as a free version with multiplayer who knows.

reviews.review_description:
This game is great in that you get many kinds of blocks just like Legos. The endless mode is where it's at. Build as much as you want. 

I think the tutorial could be improved upon. You get very basic instructions about what the buttons do but it doesn't cover all the buttons. Like how to apply stickers to the blocks.

 The instructions section isn't clear either. You finish the fish model and it tells you to place it on the shelf to make a trophy. Well I place it on the shelf and nothing happens. at this point, the tutorial is broken because I can't move on. I can hit the blue arrow button to move to next model but the step by step doesn't show up now because I haven't created a trophy.  

Overall, I believe this game can be even greater than it is now by adding more stickers, shapes and even a machine feature that allows you to create moving parts that will make the scene come alive. Please keep up the good work.
It does not let me refund the game and it is incredibly boring there isn’t any fun to the game and it’s nothing like Lego bricks

If you’re looking to build with legos, this game is perfect. I wasn’t expecting a lot when I first got the game, but then I realized how much there is to make.

There is also a super strong community on their discord server, where they host competitions and events!
Using this game with controllers is very frustrating, why you can not use your hands is beyond me.
My favourite vr game

Nice game so many glitches and bugs number 1 it can't detect my left controller but it was on and at 100 percent number 2 I counter pick up anything after 30 minutes and I know how to pick the stuff up

Not going to lie, within the first few hours I’ve played, I didn’t think I’d love it as much as I did, but this game is awesome, with more to come in future updates, my ONLY complaint is lag, which I assume will be fixed in upcoming updates and bug fixes, this $10 dollars was SO worth it though!

DEFINITELY give this game a try!
For anyone who loves Lego but doesn't have space or the pieces needs to get this game. I've created so much stuff for hours without getting bored.

You can have as little to no creative skill and still make an insane build! Its so fun and it works so good with everything you do its kinda hard to explain. I recommend this game to anyone who likes creating stuff with blocks.

Pros:
Enjoyable
Limitless
Almost the exact same to PCVR
Simplistic
Its lego, how is that not bad?

Cons:
Doesnt have in game workshop yet
No campaign yet
Might be a bit outdated from PCVR version (this might be false idk)

Overall, a perfect game for lego lovers! Definitely a must-buy. (devs pls add minifigs they’d be so cool)
It calms you down pretty much. But im missing a career Mode, or just some goals to archive.

I have seen many ads of this game a few months ago and just recently got an oculus quest 3 for Christmas. So, when I saw it in the store, I was very intrigued to buy it. But instead of getting a "chill" and "relaxing" simulator, I instead received a janky, confusing and irritating mess with weird controls and an engine worse than if you set a car battery on fire. Would not recommend it to anyone. I am already planning on getting a refund. Do not even think of downloading this game.

I've been playing this game for a while now and even got the chance to beta test it. I cannot put into words how amazing this game and it's creators are. Amazing mechanics for a cheap price and an owner who actually listens to their audience. Phenomenal game and would highly recommend

Found this game through TikTok and I had to try it out for myself. The community is really polite and very creative with their builds and the developer of the game actually listens to their community as most games, the developers never listen. I highly recommend this game to anyone that loves legos, building etc.
